title: Doria
intro:
There is limited information available on a plant known as Doria. However, I found some information on a plant called Doria (Borago officinalis), also known as Borage or Starflower.

Doria, or Borage, is an annual herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its edible flowers and leaves rich in nutrients. The health benefits of Borage include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, depression, and insomnia. The bioactive constituents of Borage include gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an omega-6 fatty acid, as well as other flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The most common herbal preparations made with Borage include tea, tincture, and oil, which are often used to support skin health, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation.
